items.author: Katharina Windpassinger
items.text: Super nice people and perfect work — would gladly do it again!

items.author: Yuji Natsuma
items.text: Really nice people, quick service and affordable — and gave me a coffee for waiting.

items.author: YouTube по Станиславскому
items.text: Very high-quality work. The shoes are like new, maybe even newer.

items.author: Valeria Komarova
items.text: Value for money 10/10! If I ever need to repair any of my shoes or anything else made of leather — this is my new go-to place!

items.author: Владимир Занин
items.text: What a great shop! The repair was done in 15 minutes! The zipper on my backpack was broken. I tried several tailors and shoe repair shops — everywhere they said it was too complicated and that they'd have to replace the whole zipper. Not here.

items.author: Max Schneider
items.text: Great service!

items.author: Jan Koemas
items.text: Great service, received the key after 2 hours and the price was moderate. They do everything to assure the customer is happy — can highly recommend!

items.author: annie
items.text: The best repair shop I've been to in Vienna. Very quick, very good work and fair prices. The owners are good people.

items.author: Nikolaus Wimmer
items.text: Absolutely thrilled with the shoe repair. One pair was resoled, and two loafers were lovingly restored and resoled with meticulous attention to detail — all at fair prices. Exceptional quality and care. I will definitely be back!

items.author: Lisa Glatt
items.text: I've brought two pairs of Dr. Martens in for repair and always got them back looking brand new. The gentleman is incredibly kind and friendly, does excellent work, and offers fantastic prices. I'll only ever come here from now on!

items.author: Lilly Weick
items.text: Great work and quality!

items.author: anna schalper
items.text: It's a truly rare combination: friendly service, excellent value for money, and fast service.

items.author: Nelson Cravos
items.text: Excellent service! Top-notch!

items.author: Anna Kasmader
items.text: Perfect — fast and fair price.

items.author: Judith Horvath
items.text: Excellent service: very fast, professional and friendly. They even took special care with specific features of the sole, and the price was more than fair.

items.author: Herbert Petz
items.text: A very professional, reliable, and friendly shoemaker. I would definitely use him again!

items.author: Ana Moise
items.text: Went there with my wedding Manolos and I was terrified to hand them to just anyone. They restored them and added protection — absolutely perfect.

items.author: Franzi Zettl
items.text: Excellent service and friendly staff.

items.author: Robi
items.text: Excellent! Thank you very much. Very friendly staff, very tidy. I'd love to come back!

items.author: Victoria Pfeil
items.text: Very nice staff and great work!

items.author: Anna K.
items.text: Incredible high-quality service. 100% recommend this place. The owners are very nice and friendly, and the prices are very good. Thank you!

items.author: Cosmin Marius Manolache
items.text: Lifesaver! My Loro Piana were completely worn and discolored — came back factory-new. Expensive, but worth every cent.

items.author: Clara (CDC)
items.text: Very good for your shoes.

items.author: Валентина Нану
items.text: I came here to make a duplicate of a rare key — honestly, I didn't really expect they could do it. The master checked it and told me it will take just a little time, and he really did it fast and very neatly. Fine price, no strange surprises.

items.author: Eduard Nanu
items.text: I found this shoe repair shop in Vienna kind of by accident — the sole on my not-so-cheap dress shoes started coming off while I was walking around the city. I just stopped by to ask if they could fix it, and I ended up getting the kind of careful, honest service you rarely see anymore.

items.author: Gleb Kuts
items.text: Super!

items.author: Alyanna Marie Miranda
items.text: Very happy with the service. My boots were repaired here and now look like new. The work is truly excellent and the price was absolutely fair — great value for money. Very friendly and professional team. Highly recommend this shop!

items.author: Dr. Namhee Joo
items.text: Very kind and professional. I feel like I've got a new pair of shoes. Thank you so much!

items.author: Sarah Abdelhak
items.text: Highly recommended. Mr. Peter is competent, fast, and friendly, and his prices are fair.

items.author: Viktoria K
items.text: Friendly, fast, and great prices!

items.author: David Waldl
items.text: Friendly, competent, helpful, affordable.

items.author: Cansu K.
items.text: The owner is quite a friendly and funny person. I loved our conversation there. He also tries to help you as much as possible with whatever problem you could be having with your shoes.

items.author: Benjamin Posch
items.text: Fast, friendly, fair and professional. I had a tricky shoe modification and he did an excellent job for a very fair price, quickly, all while being friendly. Very unusual for Vienna!

items.author: Sanja T.
items.text: Friendly & fast!

items.author: Rixa Gruhnert
items.text: Very friendly and super competent. My almost-destroyed Doc Martens look like new — I'm thrilled.

items.author: Marco Mrcela
items.text: Great service and a very nice boss!

items.author: Margrét Birna
items.text: Really nice service, good environment and fair price!

items.author: Christina Bosch
items.text: He adjusted my new shoes (which the shoemaker on Neubaugasse had rejected) — now they fit perfectly. My ideas were implemented exactly as discussed. Thank you so much!

items.author: Isabel
items.text: First-class shoemaker!

items.author: LINIRA NUTS
items.text: Fast and professional. Thank you so much!

items.author: Gertrude Haindl
items.text: A fantastic workshop. Five thumbs up!

items.author: Gregor Brandstetter
items.text: Friendly, competent, and affordable. Your first port of call for leatherwork!

items.author: Sarah Rockenschaub
items.text: The soles of my expensive boots were ruined. For a reasonable price, this lovely gentleman repaired them perfectly within a day. They really do look brand new again. An excellent craftsman — highly recommended!

items.author: Ricki Merkl
items.text: Clean and fast service. And reasonable prices. Very satisfied.

items.author: Nina Propst
items.text: I dropped off some shoes I'd practically given up on, and now they look brand new!

items.author: Andreas Gith
items.text: A master craftsman of the old school. Very, very nice, and the man can repair anything on shoes — super fast, incredibly polite, and at very reasonable prices.

items.author: Raffaele Murgia
items.text: €10 for a pair of keys. In and out in less than 2 minutes. The owner is a funny man.

items.author: Sofie Strasser
items.text: Good shoe repair at reasonable prices. Friendly cobbler, fast service.

items.author: Susanna Mayerhofer
items.text: Great owner who also repairs shoes very quickly. Friendly, approachable, and professional. Highly recommended. Good prices too.

items.author: Martin Mesenhuber
items.text: My savior in my deepest need. Thanks again!
